What we build

Technical capabilities in six fronts.

The client doesn't buy capability — they buy pain relief. But the technical set must be ready.

Web platforms, PWAs, internal ERPs, DMS and multi-unit systems designed for your operation.

Cuidar Bem · Green Future Hub
How we work

From diagnosis to go-live, with engineering at every step.

Method applied across 12 own businesses and dozens of client cases. Deep investigation, MVP in days, phased construction and continuous support.

  1. 01 1h gratuito

    Diagnosis

    We understand your context, current ERP, flows and bottlenecks. We leave with a mapped strategic brief.

  2. 02 3–7 dias

    Vision & Roadmap

    Proposal with scope, deadlines and investment. Clear prioritization, product vision and risk matrix.

  3. 03 sprints quinzenais

    Phased construction

    Releases every 15 days, shared Notion dashboard, continuous validation. You see the product growing.

  4. 04 ~60–90 dias

    Integration & Go-Live

    Connection to current ERP via API, team training, LGPD compliance, phased and safe go-live.

  5. 05 mensal

    Continuous support

    10h technical/month, WhatsApp support in 4h, 90-day post go-live warranty, quarterly evolving roadmap.

Naveo Portfolio

12 own companies. Real skin in the game.

Before offering to you, we build for ourselves. Each own business is a living lab of the method — fintech, agro, health, community, automation.

I want to build mine too →
Client cases

You bring us the pain. We develop the solution.

Companies that came with a specific demand and left with a complete digital operation.
ERP Vertical · Construção civil

ObraSimples ↗

Cliente chegou pedindo solução fintech. A gente identificou oportunidade maior: um ERP/Micro SaaS sob medida pra pequenos empreendedores da construção civil. Boletos, PIX, gestão financeira, controle de estoque, orçamentos e notas fiscais.

“Nos mostraram uma nova oportunidade de novo negócio.”
Sob medida Cliente é dono do código
Fintech PIX + boletos integrados
MRR Continuous support
Plataforma de saúde · do zero

Cuidar Bem Card ↗

Empresa de saúde criada do zero, do modelo de negócio à plataforma completa. Conceito, desenvolvimento, branding, go-to-market — Engenharia Criativa de ponta a ponta.

“Transformou em um negócio completo que está mudando a forma como as pessoas acessam serviços de saúde.”
300% Crescimento em 12 meses
3 Estados brasileiros
0→1 Conceito até operação
ESG · Hub de inovação sustentável

Green Future Hub ↗

Ecossistema colaborativo sem fins lucrativos conectando empreendedores, startups e instituições em torno de inovação sustentável. Construímos a plataforma de conexão estratégica — eventos, programas, coworking e três pilares (negócio, sustentabilidade, educação) num só ambiente digital.

“Tecnologia que conecta gente que constrói o futuro.”
3 pilares Negócio · Inovação · Educação
ESG Impacto regional
Multi-stakeholder Hub colaborativo
See all cases →
Trusted by

Unique solutions.
Concrete results.

We build alongside leading companies in different sectors — agro, health, construction, fintech, retail, ESG. From regional networks to cooperative systems: whoever joins our boat hires partnership, not vendor.

Modern and battle-tested technology.

The tools we use to build products that scale — tested in 12 own businesses.

Let's build together?

1-hour diagnosis, free and no strings attached. A gente entende sua operação, mapeia gargalos e devolve um diagnóstico estruturado em até 5 dias úteis.
